evals.name: single-module-grouping
evals.prompt: 分析以下单模块变更并生成提交分组计划: files=[backend/src/auth/login.py, backend/src/auth/register.py, backend/tests/test_auth.py], module=backend, task_id=TASK-101
expectations: Should group auth implementation separately from tests
Should correctly identify the backend module
Should suggest appropriate commit types (feat, test)

evals.name: large-changeset-analysis
evals.prompt: 分析大型变更集 (22个文件) 并生成高效提交计划: files包含 backend(8), frontend(7), shared(3), tests(4), task_id=TASK-500, description=v2-api-migration
expectations: Should successfully analyze 20+ file changes without errors
Should produce a structured grouping plan
Should not create excessive groups (keep manageable)
Should provide total commit count summary
